# Minimal test set for relaton-data-iec identifiers
# Reduced from 32,275 IDs to ~38 representative cases
# === Commit-Required Test Cases (5a638b5) ===
# /AMD not parsed as part
ISO/IEC 10030/AMD2:1992
# /COR not parsed as part
IEC 61464/COR1:2003
# /FRAG not parsed as part
ISO/IEC 30149/FRAG1
# Sheet without part (dash prefix)
IEC 60285-/1:1989
# Copublisher order preserved (NOT alphabetically sorted!)
IEC/ISO/IEEE 80005-1:2012
ISO/IEC/IEEE 8802-3:2017
# Corrigendum after VAP (CSV/COR format)
IEC 60529:1989+AMD1:1999 CSV/COR2:2007
# === CISPR Publisher ===
CISPR 10:1977
CISPR 11A:1976
CISPR 8D:1982
CISPR TR 16-2-5:2008
CISPR 10:1981/AMD1:1983
# === Joint Publishers ===
IEC/IEEE 82079-1:2019
IEC/IEEE 8802-1AB:2017/AMD1:2023
IEC/ISO 31010:2009
ISO/IEC/IEEE 8802-3:2021/AMD14:2022
IEC/ASTM 62885-7:2020+AMD1:2022 CSV
ISO 10079-1:1991
# === Document Types ===
IEC SRD 62559-4:2020
IEC GUIDE 102:1979
IEC PAS 60027-6:2004
CISPR PAS 38:2025
# === Letter Edition Suffix ===
IEC 60027-2A:1975
IEC 60027-2B:1976
CISPR 7B:1969
# === Amendments & Corrigenda ===
CISPR 10:1992/COR1:1994
CISPR 10:1992/AMD1:1995/COR1:1995
ISO/IEC/IEEE 8802-1Q:2024/AMD35:2024
ISO 10079-1:2015/AMD1:2018
ISO 10079-1:1991/COR2:1993
# === FRAG ===
IEC 60335-2-25/FRAG2
IEC 60050-111/AMD1/FRAG1
# === Multi-level Parts ===
ISO/IEC 14543-2-1:2006
IEC 60034-11-2:1984
ISO/IEC/IEEE 8802-1Q:2020
# === Edge Cases ===
IEC 112:2017
IEC 60067d:1960
ISO/IEC VIM:1993
# === Static Files ===
IEC 61360-4 DB
ISO/IEC DIR 1 IEC SUP
ISO/IEC DIR 2 IEC
ISO/IEC DIR IEC SUP
